text: The Blessed Fear of the LORD

segments.text: Blessed are all who fear the LORD, who walk in His ways!
For when you eat the fruit of your labor, blessings and prosperity will be yours.
Your wife will be like a fruitful vineflourishing within your house, your sons like olive shootssitting around your table.
In this way indeed shall blessing cometo the man who fears the LORD.

May the LORD bless you from Zion, that you may see the prosperity of Jerusalem
all the days of your life,

that you may seeyour children’s children.
Peace be upon Israel!
